subcodes.first_line: This is a Book that hath descended from the Kingdom of thy Lord, the Most Merciful. Take hold of it with the hand of might and assurance. Thus doth the Pen command thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب نزل من ملکوت ربک الرحمن خذه بید القدره و الاطمینان کذلک امرک القلم
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @living waters; water of life, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
